name: Can I still get workers comp if I wait a week to report my back injury from work?
description: Yes, up to 180 days in Utah, but report now to protect your claim.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can I still get workers comp if I wait a week to report my back injury from work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, up to 180 days in Utah, but report now to protect your claim.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, in Utah you have 180 days to report, but report immediately to avoid disqualification and ensure timely processing.[1] Delays can weaken claims if evidence fades.[2] Key factors: Employer reports to insurer in 7 days; doctor submits Form 123 in 7 days; get copies for your records.[1] Notify supervisor or HR in writing, seek treatment, and track symptoms.[1][2] Early reporting safeguards your rights to medical care and disability pay.[2]
